description: Add npm keywords to all plugins from medium through stripe to improve discoverability on npm search. Extends existing keywords array with MCP and AI agent related terms.
qualityChecks: echo 'Verifying package.json changes...' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const plugins=['medium','microsoft-word','minimax-agent','mongodb-atlas','netflix','netlify','newrelic','notion','npm','onenote','onlyfans','panda-express','pinterest','posthog','powerpoint','priceline','reddit','redfin','retool','robinhood','sentry','shortcut','slack','spotify','stackoverflow','starbucks','steam','stripe'];let ok=true;for(const p of plugins){const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('plugins/'+p+'/package.json','utf8'));if(!pkg.keywords||pkg.keywords.length<2){console.error(p+': missing keywords');ok=false;}if(!pkg.keywords.includes('mcp')){console.error(p+': missing mcp keyword');ok=false;}}if(!ok)process.exit(1);console.log('All plugins in batch 3 have correct keywords');"

userStories.title: Add npm keywords to plugins medium through stripe
userStories.description: Add MCP and AI agent related keywords to the keywords array in all 28 plugin package.json files from medium through stripe (alphabetical). Each plugin currently has keywords: ["opentabs-plugin"]. Add additional keywords for npm discoverability.
acceptanceCriteria: Every plugin package.json in the batch has keywords array containing at minimum: opentabs-plugin, opentabs, mcp, modelcontextprotocol, chrome-extension, ai-agent, browser-automation
The existing opentabs-plugin keyword is preserved (first position)
No other fields in any package.json are modified

All 28 plugins are updated: medium, microsoft-word, minimax-agent, mongodb-atlas, netflix, netlify, newrelic, notion, npm, onenote, onlyfans, panda-express, pinterest, posthog, powerpoint, priceline, reddit, redfin, retool, robinhood, sentry, shortcut, slack, spotify, stackoverflow, starbucks, steam, stripe
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/medium/package.json
- plugins/microsoft-word/package.json
- plugins/minimax-agent/package.json
- plugins/mongodb-atlas/package.json
- plugins/netflix/package.json
- plugins/netlify/package.json
- plugins/newrelic/package.json
- plugins/notion/package.json
- plugins/npm/package.json
- plugins/onenote/package.json
- plugins/onlyfans/package.json
- plugins/panda-express/package.json
- plugins/pinterest/package.json
- plugins/posthog/package.json
- plugins/powerpoint/package.json
- plugins/priceline/package.json
- plugins/reddit/package.json
- plugins/redfin/package.json
- plugins/retool/package.json
- plugins/robinhood/package.json
- plugins/sentry/package.json
- plugins/shortcut/package.json
- plugins/slack/package.json
- plugins/spotify/package.json
- plugins/stackoverflow/package.json
- plugins/starbucks/package.json
- plugins/steam/package.json
- plugins/stripe/package.json

Context:
All plugins currently have `"keywords": ["opentabs-plugin"]`. We need to add discoverability keywords so these show up when people search npm for MCP-related packages. The `opentabs-plugin` keyword must remain (it's used for npm auto-discovery by the MCP server).

Changes:
For each plugin, change the keywords array from:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin"
]
```
To:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin",
    "opentabs",
    "mcp",
    "modelcontextprotocol",
    "chrome-extension",
    "ai-agent",
    "browser-automation"
]
```

The pattern is identical for every plugin in this batch. Use a script or manual editing — the change is the same for all 28 files.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify any field other than keywords
- Do NOT change the description, opentabs field, or any other package.json content
- Keep `opentabs-plugin` as the first keyword (it's used for npm auto-discovery)
- Keep JSON formatting consistent: 2-space indent, keywords array with each entry on its own line (matching existing style)
- Do NOT touch plugins/e2e-test (not in this batch anyway)
